fragility_points: A fast drawdown toward or below 70000 before settlement would make 94% look stale.
API verification is direct but not the exact chart UI named in the rule text.
key_assumptions: Current Binance spot distance above 70000 is the main statistic the market should price.
No major downside shock or Binance-specific dislocation hits before April 20 noon ET.
Binance API readings are a valid direct verification proxy for the Binance settlement surface.
main_logical_chain: Start from the 94% market prior on a simple near-dated threshold contract.
Check the exact contract mechanics and governing source of truth on Polymarket.
Verify current Binance BTCUSDT spot and recent 1-minute closes directly.
Observe that current price is about 7% above the threshold with only four days left.
Keep a modest discount to market because short-horizon crypto tail risk remains meaningful.
main_thesis: The market is directionally right that Yes is favored because Binance BTC/USDT is currently well above 70000 and the contract is a narrow short-horizon minute-close check, but 94% looks slightly overconfident versus still-real four-day crypto tail risk.
quote_anchors: Binance BTC/USDT was around 75,029.99 during this run, about 7% above the 70,000 line.
The final close must be strictly higher than 70,000; equal to 70,000 is not enough.
source_quality_view: Good for this contract: direct Binance venue-family data plus clear Polymarket rule text, with only modest independence limitations because settlement is venue-specific.
strongest_disconfirmers: BTC can still drop more than 7% in four days, especially over a weekend or on a macro/crypto shock.
The contract settles on one exact Binance minute, so venue-specific print or operational issues can matter.
strongest_supports: Binance ticker API showed BTCUSDT at 75029.99 during the run.
Recent Binance 1-minute closes were all above 75000.
Polymarket rules clearly define Binance BTC/USDT 12:00 ET 1-minute close as the governing source of truth.
timing_relevance: High; the contract resolves at 12:00 PM ET on 2026-04-20 and this run occurred about four days before settlement.
unresolved_ambiguities: How much weekend/event volatility should be priced into a one-minute threshold check over the remaining four days.
what_would_change_view: A later Binance check showing BTC much closer to 70000, a major downside catalyst before settlement, or evidence of Binance-specific stress would lower the estimate.
